warning_pdf_task_login: Please login first to view the document.
warning_pdf_task_deny: You are not included in this signing task.
warning_pdf_task_wait: Please wait patiently until your turn to sign the document.
warning_pdf_task_wait_all: Please wait patiently until all parties finish signing.
warning_pdf_task_wait_all_admin: This task is currently in progress.
warning_pdf_task_wait_checking: Please wait patiently until all checkers finish checking.
warning_pdf_task_wait_server: This task is currently in processing.
warning_pdf_task_handling: Task processing. Please wait a while.
warning_pdf_task_not_finished: The signing process is not yet complete.
warning_auth_error_login_first: To verify signer's identity, please log in JackRabbit with to sign the document.
warning_auth_error_login_first_no_email: To verify signer's identity, please <u id='getStarted'> log in </u> JackRabbit to sign the document.
warning_auth_error_need_confirm: Please confirm your verification email or <u id='resendReq'>resend the request</u>.
warning_group_access_denied: You are unable to view the tasks due to the expiry of the Admin's subscription. To restore your access, please contact the Admin to renew the subscription.
warning_group_expired: Your subscription is currently expired. To restore your access, please contact your Admin to renew the subscription.
warning_group_expired_admin: Your subscription is currently expired. To restore you and your team's full access, please <u id='nav-upgrade'>renew your subscription</u>.
warning_group_task_suspended: This task has been suspended due to the expiry of the Sender's subscription. All signing parties involved are unable to sign this document.
warning_system_ca: This task uses system credentials to verify the identity of the signer, please log in to continue
warning_pdf_task_reviewing: Please view and check the fields.
warning_pdf_task_review_passed: Your document has been checked. Click Finish to proceed.
